method.target_selection: ten recent active, non-superseded memories owned by the evaluated room
method.bootstrap: authentic room startup files in disposable isolated directories
method.session_mode: fresh ephemeral process with no saved OMP session
method.viewport_hit: the intended memory title appeared in a selected viewport bundle
method.top_1: the intended memory title appeared in the first selected viewport bundle

limitations: This is a small calibration pilot, not a release-quality benchmark.
Exact-title asks test favorable phrase matching and do not measure paraphrase robustness.
The answering models were not used to grade retrieval relevance.
